tier.description: model lane: fast runs event-driven on the small model; judge (#62) is the dual-input review pass on a larger model at a lower cadence

kind.description: fire on newly transcribed material (the accumulation seam the distill cadence uses)

minChars.description: the inexpensive relevance gate: skip the field when the new material is shorter than this

scope.description: where the field value lives: per live session, or across sessions for the workspace

reviews.description: judge tier only (#62): the fast fieldIds this judge reviews; absent ⇒ every fast field in scope

cadenceMs.description: judge tier only (#62): minimum re-review interval, decoupled from the fast fan-out; absent ⇒ engine default
